pageDiag.desc: 页面登录相关可见证据

action.code: function(){ function isVisible(el){ if(!el) return false; const st = window.getComputedStyle(el); if(!st) return false; if(st.display==='none' || st.visibility==='hidden' || Number(st.opacity||'1')<=0.02) return false; const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width>2 && r.height>2; } function textOf(el){ if(!el) return ''; return String(el.innerText||el.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); } const include=/(登录|登錄|sign\s*in|log\s*in|signin|login|立即登录|去登录)/i; const exclude=/(退出|注销|登出|logout|sign\s*out|log\s*out)/i; const hrefRe=/(login|signin|sign-in|passport|auth|account\/login|\/user\/login|openlogin|newlogin)/i; const cta=[]; const hrefHits=[]; const logoutHits=[]; let nodes=[]; try{ nodes=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a,button,[role="button"],input[type="button"],input[type="submit"]')); }catch(_){ nodes=[]; } for(const el of nodes){ if(!isVisible(el)) continue; const label=[textOf(el), el.getAttribute&&el.getAttribute('aria-label'), el.getAttribute&&el.getAttribute('title')].filter(Boolean).join(' ').trim(); const href=String((el.getAttribute&&(el.getAttribute('href')||el.getAttribute('data-href')))||''); const onclick=String((el.getAttribute&&el.getAttribute('onclick'))||''); if(label && include.test(label) && !exclude.test(label)){ cta.push({tag:String(el.tagName||'').toLowerCase(), label:label.slice(0,160), href:href.slice(0,240)}); } if((href && hrefRe.test(href)) || (onclick && hrefRe.test(onclick))){ hrefHits.push({tag:String(el.tagName||'').toLowerCase(), label:label.slice(0,160), href:href.slice(0,240), onclick:onclick.slice(0,160)}); } if(label && exclude.test(label)){ logoutHits.push({tag:String(el.tagName||'').toLowerCase(), label:label.slice(0,160), href:href.slice(0,240)}); } if(cta.length>=10 && hrefHits.length>=10 && logoutHits.length>=10) break; } return { url:String(location.href||''), title:String(document.title||''), loginCtaCount:cta.length, loginHrefCount:hrefHits.length, logoutCount:logoutHits.length, loginCtas:cta.slice(0,8), loginHrefHits:hrefHits.slice(0,8), logoutHits:logoutHits.slice(0,8) }; }
